summary: The Ress provider divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in witness-cache and error early returns.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 270: M	crates/ress/provider/src/lib.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing witness-cache, max-window, and missing-ancestor-state returns.
No witness generation, cache lookup, ancestor execution walk, or provider error behavior changed.
